description_long: This is a whimsical bakery building with a large, chocolate-frosted donut sculpture adorned with colorful sprinkles mounted on its roof, making it highly recognizable. The facade features a bold sign reading 'BIG DONUT' above a glass entrance, flanked by two sets of double doors. The storefront is shaded by a striped awning in pink, purple, and blue, with scalloped edges, and the side walls also have matching awnings. To the left of the entrance, there is an outdoor seating area with a round pink table and two black-and-white chairs, set on a paved platform with a metal railing. The building's side and rear are simpler, with utility boxes and a back door, while the right side features a large painted donut motif. The overall design is playful and modern, with clean lines and a focus on bright, inviting colors.
description: A playful bakery with a giant donut sculpture on the roof, bold 'BIG DONUT' signage, striped awnings, and an outdoor seating area with a pink table and chairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'BIG DONUT' sign, glass entrance, striped awning, and outdoor seating area with a pink table and two chairs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the striped awnings, the side wall, and the outdoor seating area with its table and chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back wall, rooftop utility box, and a small back door or service entrance.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring a large painted donut motif on the wall, a side bench, and the edge of the striped awning.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features a large, bold sign reading 'BIG DONUT' in blocky, three-dimensional white letters. The sign is mounted above the glass entrance, directly beneath the giant donut sculpture. The style is playful and modern, with the text clearly legible and prominently placed.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A large, scalloped awning in alternating pink, purple, and blue stripes is present above the storefront and side windows. The awning does not feature any visible bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_outdoor_seating_area: There is an outdoor seating area to the left of the entrance, consisting of one round pink table and two black-and-white chairs. The seating is placed on a paved platform with a metal railing along the edge.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a playful, modern commercial style with whimsical elements, such as the oversized donut sculpture and bold, colorful awnings. The design emphasizes clean lines, geometric shapes, and vibrant colors.
